content: Tell me more about them

Could you tell me name of files in devstore
Files from Devstore refer to assets name from Devstore.
Name them
I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any files in Devstore. It seems the database query failed, and the table where file information is stored doesn't exist.
Name the entries in assets table in devstore

I've gathered the details for the entries in the assets table in Devstore. There are seven assets listed: `devstore.html`, `rmusic.html`, `skillmax_mk2.html`, `rassistantui.html`, `DevStore Feature Roadmap.docx`, `termux.apk`, and `rchat.html`.
From now on when I say files I mean list the entries in devstore
Understood. From now on, when you say "files," I will list the entries in Devstore.
Remember this and save it
I have saved the instruction to remember that when you refer to "files," I should list the entries in Devstore.
